name: Ledger Enterprise Institutional Crypto Custody and Governance API
what_it_does: Ledger Enterprise institutional crypto custody and governance REST API for banks, asset managers, exchanges, and corporate treasuries to manage hardware security module (HSM)-backed institutional crypto custody, implement configurable approval workflows, integrate with DeFi protocols, and manage multi-blockchain digital asset portfolios — enabling institutional crypto asset safekeeping with hardware-backed security through Ledger's Vault platform combining physical hardware security with programmable governance. Enables AI agents to manage vault custody for hardware-secured institutional crypto automation, handle approval workflow for multi-party governance automation, access transaction signing for hardware-backed crypto transaction automation, retrieve portfolio for multi-blockchain institutional asset tracking automation, manage account for institutional hierarchical account structure automation, handle DeFi integration for on-chain protocol interaction automation, access reporting for institutional audit trail automation, retrieve network support for 50+ blockchain network management automation, manage rule engine for automated transaction policy automation, and integrate Ledger Enterprise with institutional investment management, bank treasury, and digital asset service platforms for hardware-secured crypto automation.
use_cases: Managing institutional crypto custody with hardware security module (HSM) backing for bank and asset manager automation agents
Implementing configurable multi-party approval workflows for institutional digital asset governance automation agents
Integrating hardware-secured Ledger custody with DeFi protocols for institutional on-chain operations automation agents
Managing multi-blockchain institutional crypto portfolios across 50+ networks through Ledger Vault automation agents
not_for: Retail consumer crypto storage (Ledger Enterprise is institutional, separate from Ledger consumer hardware wallets)
Pure software custody (Ledger Enterprise is hardware-backed HSM custody)
High-frequency automated trading without human approval (Ledger governance requires configured approval workflows)
best_when: A bank, asset manager, exchange, or corporate treasury wanting AI agents to manage institutional digital assets with hardware security module backing, configurable multi-party governance, and DeFi protocol integration through Ledger's Vault platform.
avoid_when: HARDWARE INFRASTRUCTURE REQUIRED: Ledger Enterprise requires Ledger hardware security modules (either Ledger-managed or on-premise); automated software-only custody assumption misses HSM hardware requirement; automated must understand and provision appropriate HSM infrastructure. ENTERPRISE CONTRACT AND ONBOARDING: Ledger Enterprise requires institutional contract and compliance onboarding; automated self-service developer API assumption creates pending_onboarding; automated must complete Ledger Enterprise institutional onboarding. GOVERNANCE APPROVAL DELAYS: Ledger's configurable approval workflows add human approval latency; automated instant transaction execution assumption creates approval_pending delays; automated must design workflows with multi-party approval latency in mind. AMLD5/MiCA COMPLIANCE: Ledger Enterprise operates under EU financial regulations; automated US-regulatory-only assumption may miss EU requirements for European operations; automated must comply with applicable AMLD5, MiCA, and local crypto regulations.

auth.notes: Ledger Enterprise uses API key + OAuth2 for Vault API authentication; hardware key for transaction signing. REST API with JSON. Paris, France HQ. Founded 2014 by Eric Larchevêque and others. Products: Ledger Vault (institutional custody), Ledger Recover, governance engine, DeFi access, multi-network support, reporting. SDKs: JS, Python. 50+ blockchain networks. AMLD5/MiCA aligned. Backed by investors including Draper Dragon, Cathay Capital, and others. Competes with Fireblocks for institutional crypto custody.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Enterprise evaluation; production requires institutional contract
pricing.paid_tiers: AUM-based custody fees; per-network activation fees; governance plan fees; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Paris FR. AMLD5/MiCA aligned. AUM-based + per-network. Hardware HSM custody. 50+ blockchain networks.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; transaction signing and custody APIs throttled per governance workflow

known_agent_gotchas: HARDWARE SIGNING IS SEPARATE FROM API SIGNING: Ledger Vault transactions require hardware key signing through Ledger HSM; automated software-only API signing assumption creates transaction_signing_failed; automated must integrate hardware signing path through Ledger Vault workflow

GOVERNANCE APPROVAL IS HUMAN-GATED: Ledger's configurable governance rules add approval workflow delays; automated instant transaction assumption creates pending_approval state that must be resolved by human approvers; automated must design with approval latency (seconds to hours depending on governance config)

RULE ENGINE MUST BE CONFIGURED: Ledger Vault rule engine governs which transactions require approval; automated default rule assumption creates unexpected approval requirements; automated must configure transaction policies before API development

50+ NETWORKS REQUIRE PER-NETWORK ACTIVATION: Each blockchain network requires separate activation in Ledger Enterprise; automated all-network access assumption creates network_not_activated for non-configured chains; automated must activate each required blockchain network

DEFI ACCESS REQUIRES SEPARATE ACTIVATION: Ledger's DeFi integration feature requires separate activation and approval; automated unified custody-plus-DeFi assumption creates feature_not_enabled; automated must activate DeFi access separately for on-chain protocol interactions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hardware-backed institutional crypto custody. AMLD5, MiCA, GDPR, FATF. API key + OAuth2 + HSM. EU/US. Institutional digital asset and governance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hardware HSM crypto custody. AMLD5, MiCA, GDPR. API key + HSM. EU/US. Institutional crypto and governance data.
